summary: All 4 requested features verified working: 1) Word export replaces Excel, 2) User management with roles (Admin/Muhasebe/Satış Elemanı), 3) Employee selection in Sale Modal, 4) Vehicle Detail Modal and Expenses Modal from three-dot menu. Backend API tests: 10/10 passed. UI tests: All critical flows passed.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions - 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - likely due to initial render before container is fully sized. Minor cosmetic issue.

critical_code_review_comments: React console warning about span child in select/option elements in SaleModal - not breaking but should be fixed for cleaner code
Missing aria-describedby in DialogContent components - accessibility improvement needed
seed_data_creation: Used existing BMW 320i test car from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features verified working: 1) Word export on FinancePage and InventoryPage (button text 'Word'), 2) UsersPage with role management at /users with Kullanıcılar nav item, 3) Employee selection dropdown in SaleModal using /api/employees endpoint, 4) VehicleDetailModal and VehicleExpensesModal connected to three-dot menu via onView and onExpenses callbacks in VehicleCard component

mocked_apis.Email verification: MOCKED - verification code displayed on screen

features_verified.word_export: Excel replaced with Word (.docx) - backend uses python-docx library, frontend button text changed to 'Word'
features_verified.user_roles: Three roles available: admin, muhasebe, satis - stored in user document, displayed in UsersPage with badges
features_verified.employee_selection: SaleModal fetches /api/employees and populates dropdown with employee names and roles
features_verified.vehicle_detail_modal: VehicleDetailModal connected to VehicleCard via onView prop, shows full car info including expertise
features_verified.vehicle_expenses_modal: VehicleExpensesModal connected via onExpenses prop, shows transactions filtered by car_id
